summary: Client Engagement and Digital Transformation Executive with 20+ years advising C-suite leaders across HealthTech, FinTech, and e-commerce in GCC and Egypt. Proven track record as trusted advisor to enterprise clients, formulating and leading client engagement strategies, delivering outstanding solution demonstrations, and driving complex AI and cloud transformation programmes. Currently deploying 14 production AI agents in live clinical operations at Saudi German Health, partnering with technology leaders (Oracle, Health Catalyst, KLAS Research) to translate client needs into scalable digital solutions. Certified PMP and CBAP. MBA candidate at Paris ESLSCA Business School. Comfortable leading technical sales conversations, architecting solutions, and mentoring cross-functional teams across distributed, multi-cultural environments.

items: AI and LLM Solution Deployment (14 production agents)

experience.title: PMO and Regional Engagement Lead
bullets: Serves as trusted advisor to C-suite and clinical leadership across 15-hospital network in KSA, UAE, and Egypt, formulating and leading client engagement strategies for $50M digital transformation programme
Leads solution demonstrations and presentations of AI-enabled clinical platforms to executive stakeholders, translating complex technical capabilities into measurable business outcomes
Partners with Oracle, Health Catalyst, and KLAS Research technology teams to architect and deliver enterprise solutions, acting as primary client engagement lead for all technology partnerships
Deployed 14 production AI agents in live clinical operations, presenting and demonstrating AI capabilities to clinical and executive leadership to drive adoption and investment
Advises internal and external clients on overall solution architecture across digital health, EMR, AI, and analytics domains, ensuring alignment with client strategic priorities
Mentors cross-functional teams of 30 professionals on client engagement best practices, delivery standards, and solution presentation techniques

experience.title: Country Manager
bullets: Led client engagement and presales strategy for Egypt's first comprehensive FinTech SuperApp, partnering with sales teams to penetrate the market and win enterprise clients
Delivered solution presentations and demonstrations to financial institutions, regulators, and enterprise partners, translating platform capabilities into compelling client propositions
Formulated client engagement plans for complex, multi-stakeholder opportunities, driving commercial agreements with major financial institutions and service providers
Developed productivity tools and training materials for commercial teams to improve engagement effectiveness and solution selling capabilities

experience.title: Head of E-Commerce Product and IT Strategy
bullets: Advised internal clients on digital solution architecture, translating business requirements into technology roadmaps and solution proposals
Delivered executive presentations and demonstrations of digital commerce platforms to senior leadership, driving buy-in and investment decisions
Partnered with technology vendors and solution providers to architect and implement enterprise e-commerce transformation

experience.title: Product Development Manager
bullets: Led client-facing product engagement during hypergrowth, contributing to platform scaling from 30,000 to 7 million daily orders (233x growth) across GCC markets
Delivered product demonstrations and solution presentations to restaurant partners and enterprise clients, driving platform adoption at scale
Partnered with sales teams across Berlin HQ, GCC, and Egypt to support market penetration and client engagement activities

experience.title: PMO Section Head
bullets: Managed client engagement across 300+ banking clients in 8 countries (Egypt, UAE, Jordan, Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, Mauritius, South Africa), acting as trusted advisor on payments and digital technology solutions
Led solution presentations and architecture consultations for complex banking technology programmes, advising clients on platform integration, compliance, and transformation strategy
Mentored and developed team of 16 Project Managers on client engagement, solution selling, and delivery excellence
Governed 14-month Salesforce enterprise implementation (170 users, 8 countries), leading all client engagement from solution design through go-live

experience.title: Engagement Manager
bullets: Led client engagement for Mayo Clinic (healthcare business process optimisation) and AT&T (service operations transformation), serving as primary trusted advisor and solution architect
Formulated and delivered outstanding solution presentations and recommendations to C-suite executives, driving complex transformation decisions at enterprise scale
Developed productivity tools and client engagement frameworks adopted across consulting practice

experience.title: Earlier Experience (2004-2013)
experience.company: BlueCloud, Intel Corporation, SySDSoft/Intel Mobile Communication, Various
bullets: Senior Project Manager, PMO at BlueCloud (2012-2013): Client engagement and delivery for Microsoft Egypt, Vodafone Egypt, Qatar Diar
Project Manager at Intel Corporation (2011-2012): LTE (4G) mobile technology client engagement and deployment
Technical Leadership Roles (2004-2009): Solution delivery and client engagement for European and regional technology clients

education.degree: MBA, Master in International Business Administration (MIBA)
